headlines.title: ICE Halts Most Vehicle Stops After Fatal Texas, Maine Shootings
headlines.description: In the wake of two fatal ICE-involved shootings in less than a week, the Department of Homeland Security is now instructing agents to suspend most vehicle stops amid growing uproar. On Truth Social, President Donald Trump wrote, “We cannot give up one of ICE’s most important and effective crime fighting tools,” adding, “it won’t happen on my watch.” NBC’s Erin McLaughlin reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Todd Blanche confirmation hearing for attorney general
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as the Senate Judiciary Committee holds a confirmation hearing for Todd Blanche to become attorney general.

headlines.title: House Republicans push for $95B for Iran war, election measures and farm aid
headlines.description: House Republicans kicked off their plans for a third reconciliation bill for $90 billion in new money for the military during the Iran war and election-related measures.

headlines.title: Nominee for top intel post faces lawmakers eager to see him replace the current leader
headlines.description: Jay Clayton’s confirmation hearing comes amid growing concern among Democrats that the Trump administration will try to use the intelligence agencies to interfere with the midterm elections.

headlines.title: US Resumes Hormuz Blockade as Trump Threatens More Strikes
headlines.description: The United States is escalating its attacks on Iran, striking military targets including coastal defense systems and missile and drone sites. It comes as President Donald Trump in an interview warned that the U.S. will begin striking civilian infrastructure including energy targets unless Iran agrees to negotiate. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: England looks to end 60-year World Cup drought against defending champions
headlines.description: Spain stopped the unstoppable force and beat France yesterday 2-0 in the first World Cup semifinal, holding Kylian Mbappé and Ousmane Dembélé in check.

headlines.title: Thirsty England fans could down an extra 6 million pints during semifinal clash
headlines.description: The World Cup has provided a welcome boost to England’s pubs with millions more pints sold. But the industry is ailing and many are facing closure.

headlines.title: Pedro Porro define como crack para el 0-2 de España sobre Francia
headlines.description: El jugador del Tottenham sorprendió con su llegada al área y definió con una exquisitez absoluta. El rostro de Kylian Mbappé lo decía todo: devastación total.

headlines.title: Tuchel buscará que Inglaterra imponga su juego ante Argentina en semifinales
headlines.description: Quizá, el camino de Inglaterra a las semifinales de la Copa del Mundo ha sido uno de los más complicados, algo que Tuchel sabe a la perfección, pero eso no será excusa para no conseguir la victoria ante una Argentina que llega como favorita.

headlines.title: Scaloni: ”Dejaremos hasta la última gota de sudor para llegar a la final"
headlines.description: Lionel Scaloni aseguró que Argentina dejará todo en la cancha para alcanzar la final del Mundial 2026. El técnico destacó la ilusión del grupo, recordó el histórico duelo ante Inglaterra y anticipó un reto ante Jude Bellingham y Harry Kane.

headlines.title: España celebra su pase a la final y Francia admite sus errores | Voces del Mundial
headlines.description: España celebró su pase a la final tras vencer 2-0 a Francia. Oyarzabal, Cubarsí, Pedro Porro y Luis de la Fuente expresaron su emoción, mientras Mbappé reconoció que su equipo cedió el control del partido.

headlines.title: Radar Mundial: España elimina a Francia y jugará la final del Mundial 2026
headlines.description: España venció 2-0 a Francia en Dallas y aseguró su lugar en la gran final del Mundial 2026. La Roja dominó de principio a fin y ahora espera al ganador de la semifinal entre Argentina e Inglaterra.
